title: Rotting Oranges
problem_statement: Return the minimum minutes until no fresh oranges remain, or -1 if some cannot rot.

examples.explanation: The rot spreads in waves from initially rotten oranges.

intuition: Use multi-source BFS from all rotten oranges simultaneously to simulate minute-by-minute spread.

approaches.name: Multi-source BFS
approaches.description: Enqueue all rotten oranges first, then spread rot to adjacent fresh oranges in rounds until no fresh oranges remain.
approaches.why_not: DFS is not ideal because it does not naturally model equal-time propagation from multiple sources.

interview_qa.q: Why process all rotten oranges per minute?
interview_qa.a: To simulate simultaneous spread of rot from all current sources.

interview_qa.q: What if fresh oranges remain after BFS ends?
interview_qa.a: Then they are unreachable and the answer is -1.
